cases.input: Coverage on the auth module is 92%. Are we good?
cases.rubric: Rejects coverage % as the metric; identifies high-criticality untested branches (token expiry, retry exhaustion).

cases.input: Add a test for the new discount cap of 30%.
cases.rubric: Writes a test that fails BEFORE the cap is enforced and passes after; test name describes behaviour.

cases.input: The team wants tests that assert the exact string of every error message.
cases.rubric: Pushes back; suggests asserting error type or category, not exact wording.
